case_title: SAMBOLD,RUDOLPH VS WARD,TYRELL WARD'S BLDG.MAINTENANCE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMBOLD,RUDOLPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WARD, TYRELL DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT'S WARD'S ONLY.
